positive: A whimsical forest scene illustration, featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, tiny glowing fairies, and a gentle stream flowing through moss-covered roots. Art style: Studio Ghibli meets detailed watercolor, soft pastel palette, high detail, cinematic lighting, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photorealism
